ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Confirmation – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

Thank you for being a valued customer of CloudSuite. We wanted to let you know that your subscription for the CloudSuite Pro plan is set to renew on April 30, 2026.

Key details:
- Plan: CloudSuite Pro
- Renewal date: 30 April 2026
- Amount: $1,200.00 (annual fee)
- Billing method: Credit Card ending in 9273

If you wish to modify your plan, update billing information, or review your usage, please log in to your account via the following link:
<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, our support team is available 24/7 at support@cloudsuite.com or call 1‑800‑555‑1234.

Thank you for choosing CloudSuite. We look forward to supporting your business!

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
Customer Success Manager
CloudSuite Inc.

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Microsoft 365 Password is Expiring – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Alex,

This is an automated security notice from Microsoft. Your Microsoft 365 account password will expire within the next 48 hours. If not updated, you may lose access to critical services such as Outlook, OneDrive, and Teams.

To protect your account and ensure uninterrupted access, please update your password immediately by following the secure link below:
<URL>

For your safety, we advise you to verify that you are on the official Microsoft login page. If you encounter any suspicious activity or have questions, contact Microsoft Support at 1‑800‑642‑7676.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
